title: helichrysum campanulatum
intro: Helichrysum campanulatum, also known as the Tasmanian everlasting, is a flowering plant native to Tasmania. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Helichrysum campanulatum include reducing inflammation and pain, improving skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and supporting cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
